name: cotal-connector-agy
description: Cotal connector for the Google Antigravity CLI (agy): a Node shim owns the mesh agent and drives per-turn `agy -p` runs under a pseudo-TTY, serving the cotal_* tools over local streamable HTTP MCP wired in via the global ~/.gemini/config/mcp_config.json.

scripts.bundle: esbuild src/index.js --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node20 --outfile=dist/index.js --external:@cotal-ai/core && esbuild src/serve.js --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node20 --outfile=dist/serve.js --banner:js="import { createRequire as __cotalCreateRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = __cotalCreateRequire(import.meta.url);"
